jobs_results.title: Estimating Associate
jobs_results.description:
Job Description – Estimating Associate 




King Rose Construction is an entrepreneurial, growing construction company

headquartered in New York City, specializing in commercial fit-outs. Our clients include

Columbia University, NASA, and many other prestigious organizations. We have our Project

Management Office, King Rose Services Private Limited in Bangalore, which provides

backend support to the team in New York. King Rose Services is a subsidiary of King Rose

Construction.




This position will support the Estimating Department and assist with proposal

coordination, RFP management, project documentation, client communication, and

internal tracking processes for projects in the New York City market. Candidates must

possess strong communication skills, exceptional attention to detail, high ownership, and

the drive to work in a fast-paced environment. The position works exclusively out of the

Bangalore office.




Responsibilities: 




• Review and manage incoming RFPs (Request for Proposals)

• Maintain and organize project folders and documentation

• Coordinate proposal preparation and submission processes

• Perform regular proposal and client follow-ups

• Maintain and update project information in internal systems

• Prepare reports, trackers, and estimation-related documentation

• Coordinate with clients, subcontractors, vendors, and internal teams

• Ensure timely response to emails and project-related communication

• Support project activation and documentation procedures

• Maintain accurate records and data entry with high attention to detail

• Assist the estimating team with day-to-day operational activities




Requirements: 




• Education: Bachelor’s Degree

• 2 to 3 years of experience in BPO, backend operations, coordination, or data entry roles

• Excellent verbal and written English communication skills

• Strong Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Office proficiency

• High attention to detail and organizational skills

• Smart, proactive, and quick-learning individual with strong drive and ownership

• Ability to multitask and work under deadlines

• Strong professional communication and follow-up skills

• Prior experience in construction coordination or estimation support is an added advantage




Compensation: 




• Salary commensurate with experience

• Cab services provided for Female employees for drop and transport reimbursements for Male employees

• Year-end Bonus

• Medical Insurance after completion of 6 months probation in the company




Hours: 




• 7:00am EST to 3:30pm EST / 4:30pm IST to 1:00am IST




This is a tremendous opportunity to work for a leading New York City-based construction

company. We offer professional, personal, and financial growth for the right candidate.

jobs_results.title: Construction Worker
jobs_results.description:
Job Title: Construction Worker 


 Job Location: Dubai, UAE (Candidate must be willing to relocate to Dubai)


 Job Responsibilities 
 Shuttering Carpenter 


 Prepare and install shuttering/formwork for concrete structures 
 Read basic construction drawings and measurements 
 Assemble and dismantle formwork safely 
 Steel Fixer 


 Cut, bend, and fix reinforcement steel as per project requirements 
 Read bar bending schedules and site drawings 
 Ensure proper alignment and binding of steel structures 
 Mason 


 Perform brickwork, plastering, block laying, and finishing work 
 Maintain quality and accuracy in construction activities 
 Follow supervisor instructions and site safety guidelines 
 Salary: 41000 INR Per Month 


 Requirements 3+ years of working experience in construction/site as a Shuttering Carpenter/ Steel Fixer/ Mason 
 Physically fit for construction work 
 Basic knowledge of workplace safety procedures 
 Gulf experience will be an added advantage 
 Benefits  Attractive Salary Package for Semi-Skilled Category 
 Free Food Provided by Company 
 Free Accommodation Provided 
 Transportation Provided by Company 
 Employment Visa Provided 
 Flight Ticket Not Included

jobs_results.title: Construction Manager Civil - Full Time
jobs_results.company_name: Bhadani Quantity Surveyors and Training Private Limited
jobs_results.description:
We are seeking an experienced Construction Manager in Civil Engineering to oversee and manage construction projects in Bangalore. This role requires strong leadership skills and a commitment to ensuring projects are completed on time and within budget.Key Responsibilities:1. **Project Planning**: Develop detailed project plans that outline various phases of construction and timelines to ensure smooth execution from start to finish.2. **Team Management**: Lead and coordinate a team of engineers, workers, and subcontractors, ensuring clear communication and collaboration among all members for efficient workflow.3. **Quality Control**: Monitor work quality on-site to ensure all construction meets industry standards and regulations. Conduct regular inspections to identify any issues requiring immediate attention.4. **Budget Management**: Oversee project budgets, tracking expenses and resources to ensure costs remain within approved limits while efficiently allocating funds to different project needs.5. **Safety Compliance**: Implement and monitor safety measures and protocols to maintain a safe working environment for all staff, ensuring adherence to health and safety regulations.

Experience

3 - 9 Years

No. of Openings

14

Education

Graduate (B.Arch, B.Tech/B.E : Civil, Professional Degree, Certificate/Diploma/Others)

jobs_results.title: Civil Engineer required in Glorious Construction, Bangalore
jobs_results.job_title: Civil Engineer required in Glorious Construction, Bangalore
jobs_results.description: Glorious is seeking an experienced Civil Engineer to oversee and manage construction projects from planning to execution. Applicants should have a minimum of 2 years of site experience, strong knowledge of construction practices, excellent leadership and problem-solving abilities, and the ability to interpret technical drawings. The role involves analyzing blueprints, supervising site activities, ensuring compliance with safety regulations and building codes, monitoring project progress, and coordinating with contractors and subcontractors. The candidate will maintain project records, prepare progress reports, and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and quality.  A Civil Engineering degree is preferred. Salary starting from 25,000 to 35,000 as based on  experience and knowledge. Drop a mail  glorious6602  gmail com

jobs_results.title: Site Safety Officer
jobs_results.description:
**URGENT REQUIREMENT**

1. Enforcing Safety Regulations
Ensure compliance with local laws like Occupational Safety and Health Act or equivalent national standards
Implement company safety policies and procedures
Stop unsafe work immediately when needed

2. Site Inspections & Risk Assessment
Conduct daily/weekly safety inspections
Identify hazards (fall risks, electrical exposure, machinery issues, etc.)
Carry out risk assessments and recommend controls

3. Training & Awareness
Conduct toolbox talks and safety briefings
Train workers on PPE use, emergency procedures, and safe work practices
Make sure workers actually follow what they’re taught

4. Incident Investigation
Investigate accidents, near-misses, and unsafe conditions
Prepare reports with root cause analysis
Recommend corrective and preventive actions

5. Documentation & Reporting
Maintain safety records, permits, checklists, and compliance logs
Submit reports to management or regulatory bodies
Keep audit-ready documentation at all times

6. Emergency Preparedness
Develop and implement emergency response plans
Coordinate drills (fire, evacuation, etc.)
Ensure availability of first aid, firefighting equipment, and rescue plans

7. Monitoring PPE & Equipment
Ensure proper use of PPE (helmets, harnesses, gloves, etc.)
Inspect safety equipment and ensure it’s in working condition

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹12,000.00 - ₹42,536.64 per month

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Bengaluru, Karnataka

jobs_results.title: Site Supervisor (Civil)
jobs_results.description:
Job Title: Site Supervisor
Department: Construction / Projects
Industry: Real Estate & Construction

Job Summary

The Site Supervisor is responsible for supervising day-to-day construction activities, ensuring work is carried out according to approved drawings, project specifications, quality standards, safety regulations, and project schedules. The role involves coordinating with engineers, contractors, subcontractors, and labor teams to ensure efficient project execution.

Experience : 8 to 12 years

Key Responsibilities Site Supervision

Supervise daily construction activities and monitor work progress.Ensure construction work is executed according to approved drawings, specifications, and quality standards.Allocate work to contractors, subcontractors, and labor teams based on project priorities.Monitor productivity and ensure timely completion of assigned tasks.Resolve day-to-day site issues in coordination with engineers and project management.Coordination

Coordinate with civil, MEP, architectural, and finishing teams to ensure smooth project execution.Liaise with consultants, vendors, and subcontractors for work planning and execution.Ensure availability of materials, equipment, and manpower before commencing work.Participate in daily and weekly site coordination meetings.Quality Control

Inspect ongoing work to ensure compliance with project specifications and quality requirements.Identify defects or non-conforming work and ensure corrective actions are implemented.Assist in inspections conducted by consultants and clients.Ensure proper workmanship and adherence to approved construction methods.Health, Safety & Environment (HSE)

Enforce company safety policies and site safety regulations.Ensure workers use appropriate Personal Protective Equipment (PPE).Identify unsafe conditions and report potential hazards immediately.Support toolbox talks and safety awareness programs.Maintain a safe and clean working environment.Material & Resource Management

Monitor material usage and minimize wastage.Coordinate with the store department for timely availability of construction materials.Verify receipt and proper storage of materials at the site.Monitor equipment utilization and report maintenance requirements.Documentation & Reporting

Maintain daily site activity reports and labor attendance records.Report work progress, delays, and site issues to the Site Engineer or Project Manager.Maintain records of inspections, material usage, and completed work.Assist in preparing progress reports and work schedules.Required Qualifications

Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or a related field.3–8 years of experience as a Site Supervisor in the real estate and construction industry.Experience in residential, commercial, industrial, or infrastructure projects is preferred.Technical Skills

Knowledge of construction methods, materials, and site execution.Ability to read and interpret construction drawings and specifications.Basic knowledge of quality control and construction standards.Familiarity with safety regulations and construction site practices.Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word) and basic reporting.Knowledge of AutoCAD is an added advantage.Soft Skills

Strong leadership and team supervision skills.Good communication and interpersonal skills.Problem-solving and decision-making ability.Time management and organizational skills.Attention to detail and quality focus.Ability to work under pressure and meet project deadlines.If interested, Kindly reach me out on

Cont : 9154366046

Email : managerhrd@mahidharaprojects.com

Pay: ₹40,000.00 - ₹50,000.00 per month

Benefits:

Cell phone reimbursementFood providedPaid sick timeProvident FundWork Location: In person
